summary: Auto-save and Share Analysis features testing completed. Backend API tests: 9/9 PASSED. Frontend shared link tests: 7/7 PASSED. Auto-save useEffect implementation verified in code. Share URL format verified with ?snapshot= parameter. View-only mode correctly hides Save/Share/Export buttons.
passed_tests: BACKEND: Health check endpoint returns healthy status
BACKEND: POST /api/snapshots creates new snapshot with full state
BACKEND: GET /api/snapshots/{id} retrieves full snapshot including csvText, trainingResult, models, SHAP/LIME data
BACKEND: Snapshot state contains all required fields for sharing
BACKEND: Snapshot ID is URL-safe for ?snapshot= parameter
BACKEND: Snapshot count increases after creating new snapshot
FRONTEND: Shared link (?snapshot=) loads snapshot correctly
FRONTEND: View-only banner displays 'This is a shared analysis (view-only). Request access to edit.'
FRONTEND: Save button hidden in view-only mode
FRONTEND: Share button hidden in view-only mode
FRONTEND: Export button hidden in view-only mode
FRONTEND: CSV data loads from snapshot (465 chars verified)
FRONTEND: Explainability tab shows model selector with recommendation banner
FRONTEND: Exit View-Only button present and functional
critical_code_review_comments: 1. isRestoringRef (line 995) - Ref to prevent auto-save during restore operations
2. Auto-save useEffect for trainingResult (lines 1293-1300) - Triggers handleSaveAnalysis when training completes
3. Auto-save useEffect for unsupervisedResult (lines 1302-1308) - Triggers handleSaveAnalysis for clustering
4. isRestoringRef guard in localStorage restore (lines 1073-1128) - Prevents duplicate saves on page load
5. isRestoringRef guard in handleLoadSnapshot (lines 1234-1271) - Prevents duplicate saves when restoring from history
6. handleShareAnalysis (lines 1281-1291) - Creates snapshot and generates URL with ?snapshot= parameter
7. URL snapshot loading (lines 1395-1403) - Sets viewOnlyMode=true and loads snapshot on mount
8. View-only mode hides buttons (lines 2177-2181) - Conditional rendering based on viewOnlyMode state
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed snapshots for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auto-save and Share features fully tested. Key findings: 1) Auto-save triggers via useEffect watching trainingResult/unsupervisedResult with isRestoringRef guard. 2) Share URL format: /?snapshot={id}. 3) View-only mode hides Save/Share/Export buttons. 4) Snapshot state includes: csvText, targetColumn, trainingResult, models, shapGlobal, limeResult, etc. 5) Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/snapshots, GET/DELETE /api/snapshots/{id}. Sample snapshot ID for testing: 569ace77-67a (approved classification with Decision Tree 100% accuracy).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - Feature implementation test, not bug fix. All features working as expected.
